# Amba Plastolite - Full Website Content & Product Catalog

This document contains the full textual content and product catalog of Amba Plastolite, structured for indexing and query resolution by Large Language Models (LLMs) and Search Agents.

---

## 1. Company Overview & About Us

Amba Plastolite is a leading manufacturer of premium, high-durability, and chemical-resistant packaging solutions based in Indore, India. Since 2011, we have been a strategic partner for the Agro-chemical, Pesticide, Pharmaceutical, and Cosmetic industries, supplying virgin HDPE (High-Density Polyethylene) bottles and jars across the country.

### Foundational Principles
- **Quality & Virgin HDPE:** We use 100% virgin High-Density Polyethylene to ensure zero contamination and maximum strength.
- **Leak-Proof Assurance:** Heavy-duty caps, plug fits, and advanced threading to prevent pesticide and chemical leakage.
- **Chemical Resistance:** Specially designed barrier containers (co-extrusion and fluorination options) for volatile bio-chemicals.
- **UV Light Protection:** Black HDPE bottles and jars to prevent product degradation from sunlight.
- **Custom Mold Design:** In-house capability to turn concept sketches into custom-molded physical bottles.

### Board of Directors & Leadership
- **Sandeep Patidar (Director of Production & Quality control):** Manages the manufacturing plant, ensuring that every batch meets rigorous strength, thickness, and finish parameters.
- **Sanjay Patidar (Director of Client Relations & Logistics):** Oversees corporate partnerships, supply chain management, and seasonal bulk deliveries.

### History & Quality Parameters
Founded in 2011 on the principles of quality, durability, and reliability. We test all batches for:
- Drop testing (high height drop durability)
- Permeation testing (chemical barrier thickness checks)
- Leakage and airtightness under vacuum
- Dimension consistency and thread fitment

---

## 2. Corporate Office & Contact Details

### Corporate Office
- **Address:** 71, Anand Nagar, 2nd Floor, Indore (Madhya Pradesh) - 452001, India.
- **Focus:** Consultations, custom molds design discussions, billing, and corporate administration.

### Key Communication Channels
- **Telephone:** +91 98260 68066
- **Email:** ambaplasto@gmail.com
- **Operating Hours:** Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM.

---

## 3. Product Catalog Specifications

Below is the complete range of manufactured HDPE bottles, jars, and PET containers:

### 1. Amba 2 - Flair Regular
- **ID:** amba-2
- **Category:** Bottle
- **Industry:** Agro
- **Capacity:** 100ml - 1L
- **Features:** Ergonomic Design, Leak Proof, Chemical Resistant
- **Description:** Standard HDPE bottle for crop protection and fertilizer applications.
- **Image URL:** /agri-science/images/Amba-2-Flair-Regular.jpg

### 2. Amba 3 - Flair Regular (Black)
- **ID:** amba-3
- **Category:** Bottle
- **Industry:** Agro
- **Capacity:** 100ml - 1L
- **Features:** UV Protection, Tamper Evident Cap, Chemical Resistant
- **Description:** Black HDPE bottle offering excellent UV light protection for sensitive bio-chemicals.
- **Image URL:** /agri-science/images/Amba-3-Flair-Regular-Black.jpg

### 3. Amba 4 - Horizon
- **ID:** amba-4
- **Category:** Bottle
- **Industry:** Cosmetic
- **Capacity:** 200ml - 500ml
- **Features:** Sleek Design, FMCG Grade, Dispenser Pump Ready
- **Description:** Premium aesthetic bottle suitable for personal care, shampoo, and cosmetics.
- **Image URL:** /agri-science/images/Amba-4-Horizon.jpg

### 4. Amba 5 - Double Line
- **ID:** amba-5
- **Category:** Bottle
- **Industry:** Agro
- **Capacity:** 500ml - 1L
- **Features:** Graduation Scale, Sturdy Ribbing, Leak Proof
- **Description:** Heavy-duty agro-chemical bottle with double vertical lines for structural strength.
- **Image URL:** /agri-science/images/Amba-5-Double-Line.jpg

---

## 4. Key Performance Highlights & Testimonials
- **24/7 Production Cycle:** Capable of maintaining uninterrupted runtimes to fulfill urgent agricultural season demands.
- **100% Virgin HDPE:** Absolute structural integrity, preventing pesticide permeation.
- **250+ Corporate Clients:** Serving pesticide and chemical formulators throughout Madhya Pradesh, Gujarat, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, and nationwide.
